summary: VWAP and VP Session Reset (Globex vs NY) fully tested. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend labels correctly show 'VWAP Globex' and 'VP Globex' during Globex session. Position sizing correctly halved (25% for TRANSICAO during Globex).
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/session-vwaps/MNQ: globex VWAP has vwap=24282.97, candle_count=261, label='VWAP Globex'
✅ GET /api/session-vwaps/MNQ: session_ny VWAP has label='VWAP NY (RTH)'
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ: context.vwap_bands has upper_1=24316.85, lower_1=24248.99, upper_3=24384.70, lower_3=24181.14
✅ POST /api/analyze: session_vps has daily_vp, rth_vp, prev_day_vp keys
✅ VWAP bands are symmetric around VWAP value
✅ Frontend chart legend shows 'VWAP Globex' label
✅ Frontend chart legend shows 'VP Globex' label
✅ Frontend N2 panel shows 'VWAP Globex' in Multi-Session section
✅ Frontend shows 25% lot (Globex halved from TRANSICAO 50%)
✅ No deprecated 'Intraday' VWAP label found on frontend
critical_code_review_comments: calculate_session_vps_from_df correctly returns 'rth_vp' (VP NY filtered 09:30-16:00 ET)
V3 engine correctly selects VWAP Globex during overnight session
Position sizing correctly halved during Globex (50% of base lot)
Frontend DataBentoChart.jsx correctly displays 'VWAP Globex' label
Frontend N2Confirmatory.jsx correctly shows 'VWAP Globex' in VWAP row

test_credentials.note: Used for API and Playwright tests

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live market data from DataBento
context_for_next_testing_agent: VWAP and VP Session Reset (Globex vs NY) fully tested. Key changes verified: (1) VWAPService renamed 'intraday' → 'globex'. (2) calculate_session_vps_from_df returns 'rth_vp' (VP NY 09:30-16:00). (3) V3 engine selects VWAP Globex during overnight. (4) Position sizing halved during Globex. (5) Frontend labels updated to 'VWAP Globex'. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_vwap_vp_session_reset.py with 17 tests.

feature_verification.GET /api/session-vwaps/MNQ: Working - returns globex and session_ny VWAPs with correct labels
feature_verification.GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ nivel_1: Working - session_type=globex, lot_pct=25 (halved), session_lot_warning contains Globex
feature_verification.POST /api/analyze session_vps: Working - daily_vp starts 18:00 ET, rth_vp starts 09:30 ET
feature_verification.Frontend VWAP Globex label: Working - visible in chart legend and N2 panel

mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhook is MOCKED. All VWAP/VP data is REAL from DataBento live feed.
